subcodes.first_line: That which moveth the tongue is the love of God and rapture and attraction; the love of God maketh the mute to speak and causeth the deaf to hear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: محرّک لسان محبّت اللّه است و وله و انجذاب ، محبّت اللّه زبان لال را گويا کند و گوش کر را شنوا نمايد
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the power of words; of speech
